content: State-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems (2024–2025) can be rearchitected to gate episodic memory storage using the intrinsic reward signals from curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods (ICM/RND), creating a 'memorize-what-you-still-don't-understand' retention policy. This replaces traditional fixed-capacity pruning rules that discard old memories based on recency or frequency, instead prioritizing retention of under-explored memories that drive future learning.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
